title: Ptolemais #4424
definition:
Ptolemais or Accho = "warlike"

 1) a maritime city of Phoenicia, which got its name, apparently, from
    Ptolemy Lathyrus, who captured it 103 BC, and rebuilt it more
    beautifully
nasbUsage:
